records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all over now!!

records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: This really consumes a lot of CRF...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This really consumes a lot of CRF...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This really consumes a lot of CRF...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Critical damage to the main drive.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Critical damage to the main drive.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Critical damage to the main drive.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Ship's function degradation confirmed. Activating self-repair mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Ship's function degradation confirmed. Activating self-repair mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Ship's function degradation confirmed. Activating self-repair mode.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Unexpected output confirmed.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Unexpected output confirmed.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Unexpected output confirmed.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Human. You are using Interstellar Alliance technology.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Human. You are using Interstellar Alliance technology.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Human. You are using Interstellar Alliance technology.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Interstellar...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Interstellar...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Interstellar...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I just assumed you were a recording, but it seems that you can talk, eh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I just assumed you were a recording, but it seems that you can talk, eh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I just assumed you were a recording, but it seems that you can talk, eh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Do tin buckets also feel pride in their technology...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Do tin buckets also feel pride in their technology...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Do tin buckets also feel pride in their technology...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, but what can you do...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, but what can you do...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, but what can you do...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our genius has already stolen your high-tech!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our genius has already stolen your high-tech!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our genius has already stolen your high-tech!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Question. You are strange. Beyond normal range.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Question. You are strange. Beyond normal range.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Question. You are strange. Beyond normal range.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>There is no possibility that a human body can withstand the output of Avesta Drive.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>There is no possibility that a human body can withstand the output of Avesta Drive.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>There is no possibility that a human body can withstand the output of Avesta Drive.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Humans exposed to Corruption rays turn into C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Humans exposed to Corruption rays turn into C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Humans exposed to Corruption rays turn into C.O.s.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Human. Do you wish to become a C.O.?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Human. Do you wish to become a C.O.?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Human. Do you wish to become a C.O.?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! Why would I want that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! Why would I want that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! Why would I want that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I want is to protect my division members!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I want is to protect my division members!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I want is to protect my division members!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're interfering with that! That's why I'm here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're interfering with that! That's why I'm here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're interfering with that! That's why I'm here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you do something like this in the first place, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you do something like this in the first place, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you do something like this in the first place, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Answer. Under the impartial name of Asimov.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Answer. Under the impartial name of Asimov.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Answer. Under the impartial name of Asimov.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>The Interstellar Alliance has a duty to test humanity.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>The Interstellar Alliance has a duty to test humanity.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>The Interstellar Alliance has a duty to test humanity.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>To select humans to board the fleet.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>To select humans to board the fleet.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>To select humans to board the fleet.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Select...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Select...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Select...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's that supposed to mean?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's that supposed to mean?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's that supposed to mean?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>First premise. This world will meet is inevitable end.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>First premise. This world will meet is inevitable end.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>First premise. This world will meet is inevitable end.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Second premise. There is no safe destination.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Second premise. There is no safe destination.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Second premise. There is no safe destination.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Conclusion. Test all of humanity, select the few, and preserve them on the fleet.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Conclusion. Test all of humanity, select the few, and preserve them on the fleet.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Conclusion. Test all of humanity, select the few, and preserve them on the fleet.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>That is the best method to prevent extinction.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>That is the best method to prevent extinction.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>That is the best method to prevent extinction.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The best method...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The best method...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The best method...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Space within the fleet is limited.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Space within the fleet is limited.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Space within the fleet is limited.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Testing is needed to bring only the most suitable humans on board.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Testing is needed to bring only the most suitable humans on board.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Testing is needed to bring only the most suitable humans on board.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Conclusion. The remaining, worthless humans are to be eliminated.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Conclusion. The remaining, worthless humans are to be eliminated.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Conclusion. The remaining, worthless humans are to be eliminated.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Shut up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Shut up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Shut up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So because of a dumb reason like that, my comrades have to die?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So because of a dumb reason like that, my comrades have to die?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So because of a dumb reason like that, my comrades have to die?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Testing? Selecting suitable humans?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Testing? Selecting suitable humans?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Testing? Selecting suitable humans?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't kid yourself in becoming a god when all that you are is a tin bucket...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't kid yourself in becoming a god when all that you are is a tin bucket...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't kid yourself in becoming a god when all that you are is a tin bucket...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the time I managed to survive that fire by myself until I became a division Commander,
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the time I managed to survive that fire by myself until I became a division Commander,
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the time I managed to survive that fire by myself until I became a division Commander,

records.m_Talk_ENG: I vowed to myself that I would never let anyone die on my watch again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I vowed to myself that I would never let anyone die on my watch again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I vowed to myself that I would never let anyone die on my watch again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to go kill people after rambling on about testing and selecting if I don't deal with you now, right?

records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to go kill people after rambling on about testing and selecting if I don't deal with you now, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, I can't have that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, I can't have that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, I can't have that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I'm going to destroy you right now! Whatever it takes!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I'm going to destroy you right now! Whatever it takes!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'm going to destroy you right now! Whatever it takes!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apostle Simurgh...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apostle Simurgh...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apostle Simurgh...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Hostility detected. Increasing threat level to Lv. 3.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Warning. Hostility detected. Increasing threat level to Lv. 3.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Space-jumping Escort Fighter deployed. On standby.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: This will be the end of you!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This will be the end of you!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This will be the end of you!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>ASTRA DRIVE</color>!
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>ASTRA DRIVE</color>!
